prompt_text: Write a recommendation letter for Brett who is applying to a design program. Mention creativity and iteration based feedback.
response_text:
[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
[Date]

[Recipient's Name]
[Recipient's Title]
[Design Program Name]
[Program Address]

Dear [Recipient's Name],

I am writing to wholeheartedly recommend Brett for admission to [Design Program Name]. As [Brett's current/familiar] instructor, I have had the pleasure of witnessing Brett's growth and development as a designer, and I can confidently attest to their exceptional talent, creativity, and dedication to their craft.

Brett has consistently demonstrated a unique capacity for creativity and innovation in their design work. They possess a keen eye for detail and a deep understanding of visual principles, which enables them to craft compelling and effective designs. Their ability to think outside the box and push boundaries is truly impressive, and they have consistently impressed me with their bold and imaginative solutions.

One of Brett's greatest strengths is their willingness to take feedback and use it as an opportunity for growth and iteration. They are not afraid to challenge their own ideas and experiment with new approaches, and they have a remarkable ability to incorporate constructive criticism into their work. This dedication to iteration-based feedback has allowed them to refine their designs and produce high-quality work that is both visually stunning and highly effective.

Throughout their time in my class, Brett has consistently demonstrated a strong work ethic and a passion for design. They are an excellent collaborator and team player, and they have a natural ability to communicate their ideas and vision to others. Their enthusiasm and dedication to the design process are contagious, and they have a positive impact on those around them.

I have no doubt that Brett would thrive in [Design Program Name]. Their creativity, passion, and commitment to design make them an ideal candidate for this program. I strongly recommend Brett for admission and am confident that they will make valuable contributions to the design community.

If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact me. I would be more than happy to discuss Brett's qualifications and potential further.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]
[Your Institution]
